ios.//: Build-ready config (no iOS build shipped yet — needs an Apple Developer account to sign).

infoPlist.//: The LAN bridge is cleartext ws:// on the local network; iOS blocks that under ATS unless we opt into local networking, and iOS 14+ requires a local-network usage string.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Loom connects to your laptop's Loom over your local network to drive and observe your fleet.

plugins.cameraPermission: Loom uses the camera once, to scan the pairing QR on your laptop.

plugins.//: The LAN bridge is ws:// (cleartext transport) but app-layer sealed (ChaCha20-Poly1305 under the pairing key), so release builds must allow cleartext or the WebSocket fails instantly — debug allowed it via a Metro overlay, masking this until a release build.

plugins.microphonePermission: Loom uses the mic for hold-to-talk dictation into a pane.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Loom turns your speech into text to send to a pane.

plugins.photosPermission: Loom attaches a photo to send to an agent on your laptop.
plugins.cameraPermission: Loom uses the camera to send a photo to an agent on your laptop.
